_meta.name: fragment_store_traces
_meta.description: FEAT-2671 purpose-built fixture set modeling Tier 0-like repeated-call patterns (same skill invoked across iterations with stable vs. churning skill_body/system_prompt/tool_definitions fragments) for the fragment-store hit-rate AC. Not derived from the locked tier0_traces set, whose usage_jsonl_v1 rows carry no prompt-content fields to hash.
_meta.measurement: FragmentStore.put() hit/miss over each call, replayed in trace order
